rulings.Case Title: DANIELS VS MORGAN
rulings.Rulings: COURT STRIKES DEFENDANTS WALTER JR., WALTER, SR., CHERYL, AND NORDE. AT TIME OF INCIDENT PLAINTIFF WAS AWARE OF DEFENDANTS IDENTITIES THERFORE AMENDMENT UNDER CCP 474 IMPROPER. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: HOUSING GROUP VS UNITED NATIONAL INS
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF GENERALI SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ALLEGATIONS OF ALTER EGO. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE SPIRITUALIST VS JORDAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complt
rulings.Rulings: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND - GRANT & DENY IN PART. PLAINTIFF MAY PLEAD A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR RESCISSION AND ADD ALLEGATIONS RE B&P 7057. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT ADD ALLEGATIONS RE B&P 7031(B). PLAINTIFF CAN ALSO PLEAD ADDITIONAL FACTS RE FRAUD IN THE INDUCEMENT. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE SPIRITUALIST VS JORDAN
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT - OFF CALENDAR MOOT. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN GATE SPIRITUALIST VS JORDAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Deft. Walter B. Jordan'S Notice Of Hearing And Renewed Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: RENEWED MOTION TO COMPEL - DENY UNDER CCP 1281.2(C). EVEN IF THE COURT ORDERS ARBITRATION, THE PARTIES ARE STILL SUBJECT TO CONFLICTING RULINGS. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM R WHELAN VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, PER DISMISSAL. (302/AJR/ju)

rulings.Case Title: GKO & ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. EDUARDO MARTINEZ ARCHITECTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Not Of Mot And Mot To Quash Service And Dismiss The Complaint
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE DENIED - DEFENDANT ESTOPPED TO MOVE TO QUASH BY SERVICE BECAUSE COMPLAINT RE-SERVED AT COUNSEL'S REQUEST. IN ADDITION, COURT FINDS MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE CONSTITUTES GENERAL APPEARANCE. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. CONTRACT DOCUMENTS FILED WITH OPPOSITION SHOW CONTRACT ENTERED INTO IN SAN FRANCISCO. (302/AJR/KS(EX))

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED 1)STATUTE INAPPLICABLE TO SALE OF PRODUCTS 2)ADVERTISING NOT AN ISSUE OF PUBLIC INTEREST 3)IN THE ALTERNATIVE COURT DENIES BECAUSE PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON MERITS. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: MARITZA ROLDAN VS. THE SALVATION ARMY, A CALIF. CORP. DBA THE et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER: FEHA CAUSES OF ACTION - 1ST, 2ND, 3RD, 4TH, 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER THE FEDERAL AMERICAN WITH DISABILITIES ACT AND LABOR CODE SECTION 132A. DEFAMATION - 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE MALICE. INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS - 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEK LEAVE OF COURT FOR PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: CYRIL AND CROWLEY LLP VS. LAWYERS MANAGEMENT INSURANCE SERVICES (LMIS)
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Attorney'S Fees;
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/AJR/ju)

rulings.Case Title: JUNE CROUCHER VS. GRACE WELLS et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLEADING OF ESTOPPEL NOT SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS WITH RESPECT TO "STATEMENT THAT SHE QUALIFIED FOR AN EXTENSION AND RELOCATION" MUST BE MORE SPECIFIC AS TO WHAT WAS SAID AND HOW THAT STATEMENT LED LANDLORD TO BELIEVE IF EXTENSION AND RELOCATION WAS PROVIDED TENANT WOULD NOT AFTER ACCEPTING THOSE BENEFITS THEN RAISE SOME OTHER LEGAL OBJECTION TO ELLIS ACT EVICTION. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT TENANT DENIED. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: BUENA VISTA PARK, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. KATHLEEN HAGAN et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY LANDLORD PLAINTIFF GRANTED. HCO COMPLIANCE NOT REQUIRED IN ORIGINAL NOTICE. NOTICE GIVEN FOR DISABLED EXTENSION MAY LANGUAGE ADEQUATE IN CONTEXT. (302/AJR/RS)
